overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character exploring a futuristic indoor facility. The character moves from a small storage room through a narrow corridor with distinctive red walls into a larger lobby area with cylindrical structural pillars. The environment features clean metallic surfaces, artificial lighting, and sparse NPC presence.

scene_state.functional_zone: small storage room with metal shelving

events.description: character turns around to exit the storage room
exiting the storage room into the main corridor

agents.ego_description: character enters a storage room, briefly observes the shelves, then turns to exit back through the heavy door

entered.detail: large industrial metal door frame with visible hydraulic hinges
tall metal shelving racks with multiple levels
rectangular white containers stacked on the shelves

segments.scene_description: The character enters a small enclosed storage room containing metal shelving units with white containers. After a brief look around, the character turns and exits through the heavy industrial doorway, transitioning from the tiled storage floor toward the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor with red accent walls and vertical lighting

events.description: entering the carpeted corridor with red walls from the storage area
continuing straight down the corridor toward the distant figures

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the corridor toward two individuals standing near the far end

notable_agents.action: two individuals standing and conversing near the corridor end

entered.detail: long vertical LED light fixture running floor to ceiling
wall section painted red with metallic circular decorations
red illuminated exit sign mounted above the doorway
tall potted plant in white circular planter

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a carpeted corridor flanked by vertical light strips and distinctive red accent walls with circular metallic decorations. Two NPCs stand conversing at the far end near an exit sign, while potted plants add sparse vegetation to the otherwise utilitarian space.

events.description: exiting the narrow corridor into the open lobby area with large pillars
navigating around the large cylindrical pillars while continuing forward

agents.ego_description: walking through the spacious lobby, navigating around structural pillars while observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: person in red uniform standing near the wall with hands behind back

entered.detail: large metallic structural column with ladder rungs and warning stripes
illuminated information display screen mounted on the wall
long counter with staff visible behind glass panels

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the corridor into a spacious lobby dominated by large cylindrical structural pillars. The environment opens up significantly, revealing digital signage, a reception area, and additional NPCs. The character navigates around the pillars while moving deeper into the facility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a cramped industrial storage area into a vast, futuristic facility lobby. It begins inside a small enclosed room filled with metal shelving and white containers before the character turns and exits through a heavy industrial doorway. As the character moves forward, the space shifts into a narrow carpeted corridor defined by vertical light strips and distinctive red accent walls, passing by potted plants and conversing NPCs. The scene then opens up significantly as the character emerges from the corridor into a spacious lobby dominated by massive cylindrical structural pillars and digital signage. Finally, the camera navigates around these pillars and past a reception area, moving deeper into the expansive interior of the facility.
